summary: Tier 3 paragraph of the Part 1 evidence-roadmap has been rewritten to lead with strength (Gaia parallax, GPS ~38 µs/day, Southern-Hemisphere great-circle distances) rather than previewing the dome defender’s "measured from the wrong frame" escape hatch. The hierarchy logic (Tier 1 is strictly stronger because it needs no external data) is preserved in the last sentence. Minimal-diff find_and_replace is provided; full replacement_html is also provided. Decider: apply the patch to data/sections.json part1.html, then close ISS-920.
